prompt: Create a hyperlink in cell A1 to https://www.example.com
workbook:
Headers: A1=Link
Data:
A2:

prompt: Remove the hyperlink from cell A1
workbook:
Headers: A1=Link
Data:
A2: https://www.example.com

prompt: Add a comment to cell A1 with the text 'This is a comment'
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y
Data:
A2:val | B2:val

prompt: Delete the comment from cell A1
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y
Data:
A2:val | B2:val

prompt: Create a sparkline in cell C2 to show the trend of values in cells A2:A10
Add a sparkline to cell D2 to display the high and low points of the data in cells B2:B10
Set the page orientation to landscape for the current worksheet.
Set the top margin to 1 inch for the current worksheet.
Add a rectangle shape to cell A1
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y
Data:
A2:val | B2:val

prompt: Insert a circle shape in the top-right corner of the worksheet
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y
Data:
A2:val | B2:val

prompt: Set the page orientation to portrait for all worksheets in the workbook, except for the worksheet named 'Summary', which should be set to landscape.
workbook:
Headers: A1=Name | B1=Sales
Data:
A2:John | B2:100
A3:Jane | B3:200
Worksheets: Summary, Sales, Report

prompt: Set the left and right margins to 0.5 inches for all worksheets in the workbook, but only if the worksheet has more than 10 rows of data.
workbook:
Headers: A1=ID | B1=Description
Data:
A2:1 | B2:Item 1
A3:2 | B3:Item 2
... A12:11 | B12:Item 11
Worksheets: Products, Orders, Inventory

prompt: Set the header and footer margins to 0.25 inches for the current worksheet, and center the header and footer text.
Set the scale to 150% for all worksheets in the workbook, but only if the worksheet has a specific keyword 'Confidential' in the cell A1.
workbook:
Headers: A1=Confidential | B1=Project
Data:
A2:Project Name | B2:Top Secret
Worksheets: Project1, Project2, Public

prompt: Add a comment to the cell with the highest value in column A, with the text 'Max value in column A'
workbook:
Headers: A1=Value | B1=Category
Data:
A2:10 | B2:Cat1
A3:20 | B3:Cat2
A4:30 | B4:Cat3

prompt: Delete all comments from cells in the range A1:E5 that contain the text 'Old comment'
workbook:
Headers: A1=Col1 | B1=Col2 | C1=Col3 | D1=Col4 | E1=Col5
Data:
A2:val | B2:val | C2:val | D2:val | E2:val
A3:val | B3:val | C3:val | D3:val | E3:val

prompt: Update the comment in cell A1 to include the current date, if the comment already exists
workbook:
Headers: A1=Date | B1=Description
Data:
A2:2022-01-01 | B2:Comment exists

prompt: Copy the comment from cell A1 to all cells in the range B2:B5 that have the same value as cell A1
workbook:
Headers: A1=Value | B1=Category
Data:
A2:10 | B2:Cat1
A3:20 | B3:Cat2
A4:10 | B4:Cat1
A5:30 | B5:Cat3

prompt: Set the page orientation to landscape for all worksheets in the workbook that have a table with a specific header 'Sales Data', and set the scale to 120% for those worksheets. For other worksheets, set the page orientation to portrait and the scale to 100%.
workbook:
Headers: A1=Sales Data | B1=Region
Data:
A2:100 | B2=North
A3:200 | B3=South
---
Sheet2:
A1=Expenses | B1=Category
Data:
A2:500 | B2=Rent

prompt: Set the top and bottom margins to 0.75 inches for all worksheets in the workbook that have more than 20 rows of data, and set the header and footer margins to 0.5 inches for those worksheets. For worksheets with less than 20 rows, set the top and bottom margins to 0.5 inches and the header and footer margins to 0.25 inches.
workbook:
Headers: A1=Name | B1=Age
Data:
A2:John | B2:25
A3:Jane | B3:30
... (25 rows)
---
Sheet2:
A1=Product | B1=Price
Data:
A2:ProductA | B2:10.99
A3:ProductB | B3:9.99

prompt: Set the page orientation to portrait for all worksheets in the workbook that have a specific keyword 'Draft' in the cell A1, and set the scale to 90% for those worksheets. For other worksheets, set the page orientation to landscape and the scale to 110%.
workbook:
Headers: A1=Draft | B1=Version
Data:
A2:1.0 | B2=Initial
---
Sheet2:
A1=Final | B1=Version
Data:
A2:2.0 | B2=Updated

prompt: Set the left and right margins to 1 inch for all worksheets in the workbook that have a table with a specific column 'Date', and set the header and footer margins to 0.5 inches for those worksheets. For worksheets without a table or without the 'Date' column, set the left and right margins to 0.5 inches and the header and footer margins to 0.25 inches.
workbook:
Headers: A1=Date | B1=Sales
Data:
A2:2022-01-01 | B2:100
A3:2022-01-02 | B3:200
---
Sheet2:
A1=Product | B1=Price
Data:
A2:ProductA | B2:10.99
A3:ProductB | B3:9.99

prompt: create a stacked area chart using the data in A1:C10, with a custom title and axis labels
workbook:
Headers: A1=Category | B1=Series1 | C1=Series2
Data:
A2:CatA | B2:10 | C2:20
A3:CatB | B3:15 | C3:30
A4:CatC | B4:20 | C4:40
A5:CatD | B5:25 | C5:50
A6:CatE | B6:30 | C6:60
A7:CatF | B7:35 | C7:70
A8:CatG | B8:40 | C8:80
A9:CatH | B9:45 | C9:90
A10:CatI | B10:50 | C10:100

prompt: create a combo chart with a line series and a column series using the data in A1:B10 and C1:D10 respectively
create a scatter chart with a trendline using the data in A1:B10, and format the trendline to display the equation and R-squared value
create a radar chart using the data in A1:E5, with custom axis labels and a filled area
workbook:
Headers: A1=Category | B1=Series1 | C1=Series2 | D1=Series3 | E1=Series4
Data:
A2:CatA | B2:10 | C2:20 | D2:30 | E2:40
A3:CatB | B3:15 | C3:30 | D3:45 | E3:60
A4:CatC | B4:20 | C4:40 | D4:60 | E4:80
A5:CatD | B5:25 | C5:50 | D5:75 | E5:100

prompt: merge the tables in the worksheets 'Sales' and 'Expenses' into a single table in a new worksheet named 'Summary', including a column for the worksheet name
workbook:
Sales: Headers: A1=Date | B1=Amount
Data:
A2:2022-01-01 | B2:100
A3:2022-01-02 | B3:200
Expenses: Headers: A1=Date | B1=Amount
Data:
A2:2022-01-01 | B2:50
A3:2022-01-02 | B3:75

prompt: create a table from the data in A1:C10, then add a column with a formula that calculates the average of the values in columns B and C, and finally sort the table by this new column in descending order
create a table from the data in A1:E5, then apply filters to columns B and D to only show rows where the value in B is greater than 50 and the value in D is less than 100

create a table from the data in A1:C10, then add a total row with formulas that calculate the sum, average, and count of the values in column B, and finally format the total row with a bold font and a background color
Add a comment to all cells in column A that have a value greater than the average of the values in column B, with the text 'Above average'
workbook:
Headers: A1=Score | B1=Weight
Data:
A2:90 | B2:10
A3:80 | B3:20
A4:95 | B4:15

prompt: Delete all comments from cells in the range C1:E10 that contain the text 'Old comment' and have a formula that references a cell in column A
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y | C1=Z
Data:
A2:val | B2:val | C2:=A2*B2
A3:val | B3:val | C3:=A3*B3

prompt: Update the comment in all cells in the range A1:B5 to include the current value of the cell, if the comment already exists and the cell has a value greater than 0
Copy the comment from the cell with the maximum value in column A to all cells in the range C1:C10 that have the same value as the cell with the minimum value in column B
workbook:
Headers: A1=X | B1=Y | C1=Z
Data:
A2:90 | B2:10 | C2:val
A3:80 | B3:20 | C3:val
A4:95 | B4:15 | C4:val
